throughput_strategy: Batches of 4 concurrent module-producer sub-agents. Each sub-agent does: read CED section + AGENT_RECIPE.md, draft outline, self-review against CED, write script.json + build_slides.py, run build_slides.py, verify slide count. Orchestrator (this agent) spot-checks: script.json parses, slide count matches, no obvious CED conflicts.
resume_protocol: If a sub-agent halts or context runs out, this plan + per-module folder state on disk is the resume marker. Any folder lacking script.json + build_slides.py + slides/*.png is a candidate for Slot B (5am CT) or next-day to retry.
